title: Oil prices mixed as Trump reaffirms deadline for bombarding Iran's power plants, bridges
summary_full: Oil prices were mixed after Trump repeated the Tuesday deadline for escalating attacks on Iran's power plants and bridges.
summary_public: Oil prices were mixed after Trump repeated the Tuesday deadline for escalating attacks on Iran's power plants and bridges.
